definition.name: eps_JB_algebra
definition.definition: def-eps-jb-algebra (consensus, locked). An eps-JB algebra (order-unit form), eps>=0, is a finite-dim real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm ||.||, and a commutative bilinear product o:AxA->A for which COMMUTATIVITY a o b=b o a and the UNIT LAW 1 o a=a hold EXACTLY, and such that for all a,b in A: (JB1) ||a o b|| <= (1+eps)||a|| ||b||; (JB2) ||a o a|| >= (1-eps)||a||^2; (JB3) a o a >= -eps ||a||^2 1; (JB4) ||((a o a) o b) o a - (a o a) o (b o a)|| <= eps ||a||^3 ||b||. Exactly FOUR axioms; the order/unit/norm are exact, only the product carries the defect eps.
